---
applyTo: "src/**/*.ts,src/**/*.tsx"
description: "Frontend rules for React UI work"
---

For UI changes, consult:
- `docs/clean-architecture.md`
- `docs/accessibility.md`
- `docs/seo.md`

Requirements:
- Use semantic structure and proper labeling.
- Ensure keyboard/focus behavior and clear error messaging.
- Preserve existing design system patterns.
